findings.description: The source provides a concrete use case for `extendedStringConvertors`: removing slashes from date strings such as 2011/09/09. This practical usage guidance helps developers decide when to apply the attribute but is absent from the knowledge file.
findings.source_evidence: スラッシュが付与された年月日文字列（2011/09/09）からスラッシュを除去したい場合などにextendedStringConvertors属性を指定する。

findings.description: The knowledge file's Java code example omits the `private String date;` field declaration that appears in the source. The source shows the complete Form class structure including the field declaration before the annotated setter.

The source contains 9 h2-level class sections (StringConvertor, StringArrayConvertor, BigDecimalConvertor, IntegerConvertor, LongConvertor, RequiredValidator, LengthValidator, NumberRangeValidator, SystemCharValidator), each with its own `====` heading. The knowledge file consolidates all 9 into a single section `s1` instead of using one section per class.

`parseFailedMessageId` is a property name that appears in the XML configuration code example for `YYYYMMDDConvertor` and is relevant for users configuring `extendedStringConvertors`. It is not included in the hints array.
